name: Ken McKay
subject: the rules
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
The Christie campaign isn't made up of whiners, there are rules
and we are going to play by them.

No doubt Governor Christie is going to make a statement no matter
what stage he is on, but if you believe that voters should decide
who is the next Republican nominee for President of the United
States, chip in now to help Governor Christie continue to fight
until the first primary polls open in February.
Ken McKay
---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: James Garcia
Date: Fri, Nov 6, 2015
Subject: Heading in to Tuesday's debate

Here's what Governor Christie had to say about FOX Business
Network's debate lineup for Tuesday.

We couldn't agree more. Governor Christie is the most tested,
ready and mature leader in the field. He's a proven fighter and
it doesn't matter what stage he's on to fight for the American
people.

Tuesday night, he will, once again, show why he is the person
best prepared to be President.

We have seen growing momentum since the CNBC debate as people
are giving Governor Christie a more serious look as a viable
contender. This culminated this week as a video of Governor
Christie speaking passionately and personally about drug
addiction went viral - with over 6 million views.

Huffington Post: Christie Makes Emotional Plea To Rethink Drug
Addiction Treatment

Breitbart - Chris Christie's Moving Plea for Treating
Addiction: 'Every Life is an Individual Gift From God'

In a race where according to the latest CBS/NYT poll 71% of
Republican primary voters have said it's too early to make a
decision, we know Chris Christie is well positioned to keep
campaigning aggressively until the first votes are cast.

Christie has been spending substantial time in the states
interacting directly with voters and seeing his image steadily
improve. It's real and sustained progress that is a future
indicator of ballot strength and as the Monmouth poll from
November 2nd states, "candidate ratings can be a leading
indicator for potential shifts in the vote choice."

Governor Christie has improved his ballot score in every single
national poll since the debate.

2% (+1) - FOX

3% (+1) - Quinnipiac

4% (+1) - Morning Consult

5% (+2) - Reuters

Governor Christie has improved his ballot score in primary state
polls since the debate.

8% (+6) - WBUR in New Hampshire to surpass Jeb Bush

3% (+2) - CNN and PPP in Iowa

National and state polls have come out showing his favorable
ratings better than ever, higher than Jeb Bush and John Kasich
nationally and in New Hampshire and Iowa.

Governor Christie's fav/unfav nationally is 57/23 (+34),
that's a 27 point increase in Christie's net favorability
since August

Governor Christie's fav/unfav in New Hampshire is 54/27
(+27), that's a 23 point increase in Christie's net
favorability since September.

Governor Christie's fav/unfav in Iowa is 48/28 (+20),
that's a 30 point increase in Christie's net favorability
rating since August. Governor Christie's combined first and
second choice support has doubled since September, up from 4% to
8%.

It is clear that Governor Christie is only rising in the polls
in primary states and the best candidate to take on Clinton and
the Democrats next year.

As Governor Christie said yesterday at his 30th town hall in New
Hampshire:

"I'm going to fight as hard as I have to fight to become your
president and the good news for you on that is then once I get
there, you'll never have to wonder how hard I'm willing to fight
for you because you'll have watched me fight. You'll have seen
what I'm capable of when I'm trying to get there. I hear lots of
people in this race, who are all moaning about one thing or
another. I mean, like, oh you know, I don't like this, I don't
like that. This isn't fun. I thought this was going to be more
fun. I thought this was going to be different. I thought this was
going to be better. I don't like this guy. I don't like her. I
don't like him. Stop. You're running for President of the United
States. It is an extraordinary honor and privilege just to have a
chance to stand on the stage and run for President of the United
States. Believe me."
- James

Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.

Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax
deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax
purposes.

You can view this email in your web browser here: http://echo7.bluehornet.com/p/v6igi5dLNm

P.O. Box 9119
Morristown, NJ 07963
(973) 936-9318

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

You can unsubscribe instantly here: http://echo7.bluehornet.com/p/o6igi5dLNm

name: Coach Marco
subject: Game day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44791465:Jpsl0dLNt:m:1:1349778030:6AA34EA8D6BAD26E1CF495491411DF51:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Saturdays are usually game day for my sons' football teams and even with the campaign, I try help out with coaching duties. I always tell my kids that the lessons they learn in sports apply to everyday life. If your team has done really well and you're a lock for the playoffs, you still have to take every game (and every play) seriously.
And that's exactly how I'm approaching Tuesday's debate. The last three debates have been great opportunities for our campaign to introduce our optimistic message, tell my story, and invite them to join our team. [**> >Donate now to join Marco's team!<<**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44791466:Jpsl0dLNt:m:1:1349778030:6AA34EA8D6BAD26E1CF495491411DF51:r) But just like in sports, you can't take anything for granted and my team and I are preparing to take advantage of every opportunity Tuesday night's debate affords us. But we can't do this without your support. **[Click here to donate $10 right now and let me know you're on the team and ready for Tuesday night.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44791466:Jpsl0dLNt:m:1:1349778030:6AA34EA8D6BAD26E1CF495491411DF51:r)** It's the fourth network to host a debate and that means a new audience of Americans will tune in. Unfortunately, we also saw that other campaigns and even the moderators were out to get us. We were prepared then and -- **[if you chip in](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44791466:Jpsl0dLNt:m:1:1349778030:6AA34EA8D6BAD26E1CF495491411DF51:r)** \-- we'll be prepared next week, too. I'm glad you're on our team! Marco Rubio
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44791466:Jpsl0dLNt:m:1:1349778030:6AA34EA8D6BAD26E1CF495491411DF51:r)
---
|
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

name: Ron Paul
subject: UPDATE: Launch a revolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

November 5th launched a revolution for me.

Let's make it launch a comeback for Rand.

We all know the media tries to black him out.

But he is breaking through.

The video of his fiery speech against raising the debt limit went viral last week with over 22 million views.

We aren't going to let the media decide this.

But even in their biased polls, he is tied for fifth.

Now, he needs your help and reaching Rand's new $300,000 goal before tonight's deadline will be key.

**[So please click here to watch my special message and then help Rand by chipping in $20.16 to his campaign right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31495960:sROaf8yNo:m:1:879035888:FC69BC07F55B90BA572D420652AECF6F:r)**.

name: Ben Carson
subject: Vicious lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31500620:WXnlX8yN4:m:1:876315805:44AAF070135CF298C3AE23664979D2D0:r)
---

Peter,

If you've been watching the news, you've seen that the media is in full attack mode. They've been tracking down and interviewing my childhood friends and even accusing me of fabricating parts of my personal history.

Funny, because this was the same media that time and again declared it off-limits to dig into then-candidate Barack Obama's background.

The media's double standard is incredible, but even worse is their viciousness and blatant disregard for the truth.

**I'll be honest -- I need your help. Now. I always knew this campaign would be tough, but the media is now going off the rails and we need the resources to fight back, 24/7.

**[**Please add your name to this letter to CNN now, and let them know you're fed up.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31500621:WXnlX8yN4:m:1:876315805:44AAF070135CF298C3AE23664979D2D0:r)

It is for you and your family that I am running, and with your help I will continue -- no matter what -- to rally men and women from every race, every class and every faith together in a common cause -- to return government to the people.

As our movement continues to grow, I know the viciousness of the attacks will grow as well.

It shouldn't have to be this way, but sadly that's the reality we face. It's why people despise politics and Washington, and it's why people distrust the media.

As you enjoy the weekend with your friends and family, I hope you will take just a moment to read this email and recommit to this fight that we, together, have undertaken.

[**I can't do this without you. Please add you name to this letter to CNN right now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31500621:WXnlX8yN4:m:1:876315805:44AAF070135CF298C3AE23664979D2D0:r)

Thank you, and God Bless you.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31500620:WXnlX8yN4:m:1:876315805:44AAF070135CF298C3AE23664979D2D0:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31500622:WXnlX8yN4:m:1:876315805:44AAF070135CF298C3AE23664979D2D0:r)
---
|
---

name: Team Katie
subject: One year
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend, it's proven: when grassroots folks from Pennsylvania come together, we elect Democrats to take our country in a new direction. It's how we won sweeping victories on Tuesday here in Pennsylvania, electing all five of our judicial candidates, and it's how we're going to send Katie to the U.S. Senate one year from now in 2016.

Election Day is one year away, and we're counting on our grassroots supporters to be the backbone of this campaign. Pat Toomey and his Koch-affiliated allies saw our wins this week -- and you can bet they're mobilizing billionaire donors to defend Toomey's seat and slam Katie with negative attacks.

**[Show Katie you'll stand with her and fight back against attacks from the Koch brothers and their special interest friends. Chip in $5 or whatever you can today to support Katie.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5746732659422265344/-4361996823364108288?refcode=e20151107nd&amount=5)**

After 5 years in Washington, Toomey's shown he'll put party politics before what's best for our Commonwealth. This is the guy who voted to shut down our government over Planned Parenthood, voted against raising the federal minimum wage, and voted against making college more affordable for our kids. That's why Republican Party leaders are scheming on how they're going to keep Pat Toomey and his out-of-touch, radical agenda in the Senate -- and any plan they hatch is going to include millions of dollars in false attacks against our campaign.

We know we have what it takes to defeat extremist Pat Toomey and send Katie to the U.S. Senate. Voters proved last Tuesday that they're ready to elect new Democratic leadership in Pennsylvania, and if we keep the momentum building, we can prove it again next year when send Katie to Washington.

**[Today: Make sure Katie has the resources she needs to take on our billionaire opponents and win one year from tomorrow. Even $5 makes a big difference.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5746732659422265344/-4361996823364108288?refcode=e20151107nd&amount=5)**

Thanks for standing with us,

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5746732659422265344/-4361996823364108288?refcode=e20151107nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5746732659422265344/-2920844942605549568).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

The liberal media is at it again.

They're trying to bury my surge to 5th place in the polls.

They're trying to bury the viral video of my speech on the Senate floor, condemning the latest budget boondoggle, after it reached 24 million views.

They're pulling out all the stops to push their liberal agenda and sabotage my campaign.

I won't let them get away with it.

But I'm going to need your help to smash through their attempts to silence our message of Liberty, limited government, and prosperity.

**[Will you click here to chip in $20.16 or more to help my campaign hit our new $300,000 goal before tonight's deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31500717:WiA0S8y0N:m:1:879035888:D9069F126548845F9BD1D4CB48E20C71:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, the media is trying to stonewall my campaign's momentum.

That's why I'm counting on your support now more than ever.

**[Your donation of $20.16 will help give my campaign the grassroots strength to bulldoze through their attempts to blackout my campaign's comeback](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31500717:WiA0S8y0N:m:1:879035888:D9069F126548845F9BD1D4CB48E20C71:r)**.

The liberal media and the Washington Machine like to downplay or just flat-out ignore my grassroots-driven campaign.

The truth is, my campaign's ground game is unrivaled in the Republican field.

But constant voter contact, volunteer training, and day-to-day expenses of an operation this size requires a significant budget.

**[Please click here to chip in $20.16 to help my campaign reach our $300,000 goal by midnight tonight and prove the liberal media and the Washington Machine wrong](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31500717:WiA0S8y0N:m:1:879035888:D9069F126548845F9BD1D4CB48E20C71:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31500718:WiA0S8y0N:m:1:879035888:D9069F126548845F9BD1D4CB48E20C71:r)

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, The liberal media is at it again. They're trying to bury my surge to 5th place in the polls. They're trying to bury the viral video of my speech on the Senate floor, condemning the latest budget boondoggle, after it reached 24 million views. They're pulling out all the stops to push their liberal agenda and sabotage my campaign. I won't let them get away with it. But I'm going to need your help to smash through their attempts to silence our message of Liberty, limited government, and prosperity. ? Fellow Conservative, the media is trying to stonewall my campaign's momentum. That's why I'm counting on your support now more than ever. . The liberal media and the Washington Machine like to downplay or just flat-out ignore my grassroots-driven campaign. The truth is, my campaign's ground game is unrivaled in the Republican field. name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: Hillary Clinton is a neo-con
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Last night on _MSNBC_ , I had the opportunity to discuss why Hillary Clinton's foreign policy is a recipe for disaster.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31501385:sYPL58yN8:m:1:879035888:C8B9902727FFBC0C4AB5FF8193E126DD:r)

And unfortunately, several of my fellow Republican presidential candidates share her dangerous views.

America must negotiate from a position of strength, and the failures of the neo-con foreign policy only serve to weaken our global standing.

Fellow Conservative, I am running for president to restore sanity to America's diplomatic strategy.

But the Washington Machine and neo-cons are doing all they can to prevent my message of a sensible foreign policy from reaching the American people.

That's why I'm counting on you to **[chip in $20.16 or more](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31501385:sYPL58yN8:m:1:879035888:C8B9902727FFBC0C4AB5FF8193E126DD:r)** to help my campaign reach our $300,000 moneybomb goal by tonight's deadline.

**[Click here to stand with me against Hillary Clinton and the neo-con's failed foreign policy](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31501385:sYPL58yN8:m:1:879035888:C8B9902727FFBC0C4AB5FF8193E126DD:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31501386:sYPL58yN8:m:1:879035888:C8B9902727FFBC0C4AB5FF8193E126DD:r)
